guidance.en: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions about your child's health, education, and welfare. Choose: Joint (both parents decide together) or Sole (one parent decides alone).
guidance.es: La custodia legal significa el derecho a tomar decisiones importantes sobre la salud, educación y bienestar de su hijo.
guidance.zh: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions about your child's health, education, and welfare.
guidance.vi: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions about your child's health, education, and welfare.
guidance.so: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.ti: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.am: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.ar: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.ht: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.ko: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.pt: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.ru: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.
guidance.tl: Legal custody means the right to make major decisions.

guidance.en: If requesting sole legal custody, state which parent. If joint, leave blank or write 'Both parents'.
guidance.es: Si solicita custodia legal exclusiva, indique cuál padre.
guidance.zh: If requesting sole legal custody, state which parent.
guidance.vi: If requesting sole legal custody, state which parent.
guidance.so: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.ti: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.am: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.ar: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.ht: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.ko: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.pt: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.ru: State which parent for sole custody.
guidance.tl: State which parent for sole custody.

guidance.en: Physical custody means where the child lives. Joint physical custody means substantial time with both parents. Sole physical custody means the child lives primarily with one parent.
guidance.es: La custodia física significa dónde vive el niño.
guidance.zh: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.vi: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.so: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.ti: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.am: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.ar: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.ht: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.ko: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.pt: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.ru: Physical custody means where the child lives.
guidance.tl: Physical custody means where the child lives.

guidance.en: State which parent should have primary physical custody or if requesting joint physical custody.
guidance.es: Indique cuál padre debe tener la custodia física principal.
guidance.zh: State which parent should have primary physical custody.
guidance.vi: State which parent should have primary physical custody.
guidance.so: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.ti: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.am: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.ar: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.ht: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.ko: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.pt: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.ru: State which parent for primary physical custody.
guidance.tl: State which parent for primary physical custody.

guidance.en: Choose the type of visitation schedule: reasonable visitation (flexible, parents agree), specific schedule (detailed days/times), or supervised visitation (third party present).
guidance.es: Elija el tipo de horario de visitación.
guidance.zh: Choose visitation type: reasonable, specific schedule, or supervised.
guidance.vi: Choose visitation type: reasonable, specific schedule, or supervised.

guidance.en: Describe the specific visitation schedule you are requesting. Include: regular schedule (weekdays/weekends), holiday schedule, summer/vacation schedule, and any special conditions.
guidance.es: Describa el horario de visitación específico que solicita.
guidance.zh: Describe the specific visitation schedule including regular, holiday, and summer schedules.

common_errors.en: Being too vague. Courts prefer specific, enforceable schedules with exact days and times.

tips.en: Include pickup/dropoff times and locations. Address holidays by name and year (alternating).

fields.field_label: Facts supporting best interest of child

guidance.en: Explain why your requested custody arrangement serves the child's best interest. Address: child's health and safety, child's relationship with each parent, history of abuse or domestic violence, child's ties to school and community.
guidance.es: Explique por qué su acuerdo de custodia solicitado sirve al mejor interés del niño.
guidance.zh: Explain why your custody arrangement serves the child's best interest.
guidance.vi: Explain why your custody arrangement serves the child's best interest.

common_errors.en: Focusing on what's wrong with the other parent instead of what's best for the child.
common_errors.es: Focusing on the other parent instead of the child.
common_errors.zh: Focusing on the other parent instead of the child.
common_errors.vi: Focusing on the other parent instead of the child.
common_errors.so: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.ti: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.am: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.ar: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.ht: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.ko: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.pt: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.ru: Focus on the child, not the other parent.
common_errors.tl: Focus on the child, not the other parent.

tips.en: Courts focus on the child's needs, not parental conflict. Lead with the child's wellbeing.
tips.es: Courts focus on the child's needs.
tips.zh: Courts focus on the child's needs.
tips.vi: Courts focus on the child's needs.

guidance.en: If there is a history of domestic violence, describe incidents with dates and details. Under Family Code § 3044, there is a rebuttable presumption against custody to a parent who committed DV within the last 5 years.
guidance.es: Si hay un historial de violencia doméstica, describa los incidentes con fechas y detalles.
guidance.zh: Describe DV history with dates. FC § 3044 creates presumption against custody for DV perpetrator.
guidance.vi: Describe DV history with dates. FC § 3044 creates presumption against custody for DV perpetrator.
guidance.so: Describe DV history with dates and details.
guidance.ti: Describe DV history with dates and details.
guidance.am: Describe DV history with dates and details.
guidance.ar: Describe DV history with dates and details.
guidance.ht: Describe DV history with dates and details.
